queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of negative checking account balances as a credit risk driver contributing to increased default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the absence of a checking account and their contribution to elevated credit risk.
Empirical analysis of extended loan durations in months as a mitigating factor in reducing credit default probability.
